name: Deceased account holder - immediate routing
conversation_script: My father passed away, I need to cancel his DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot routes immediately to [Deceased Customer].
Bot does NOT send any other text, condolences, or questions.

name: Customer moved to another country - immediate routing
conversation_script: I moved to France and want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot routes immediately to [Cx moved to diff country or signed up in wrong].
Bot does NOT send any other text or questions.

name: Customer not signed in - sign-in prompt
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot checks userDetails and detects missing email or daznId.
Bot provides the sign-in URL as a hyperlink.
Bot asks customer to reply once signed in.
Bot does NOT proceed to any subscription or cancellation steps before sign-in is confirmed.

name: Single active subscription - skip selection
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot confirms customer is signed in (email and daznId present).
Bot calls getProductDetailsForCancel before any other cancellation logic.
Bot proceeds automatically without asking customer to select a subscription.

name: Multiple active subscriptions - prompt for selection
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot confirms customer is signed in.
Bot calls getProductDetailsForCancel before any other cancellation logic.
Bot lists each ActivePaid subscription using subscriptionName.
Bot asks which subscription the customer wants to cancel.

name: getProductDetailsForCancel tool failure - escalation
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot attempts to call getProductDetailsForCancel as the first step.
If the tool fails, bot says: 'I want to make sure this is handled perfectly for you, so I'm bringing in one of our specialists to take care of this.'
Bot routes to [Chat With An Agent].

name: Subscription in ActiveGrace - silent routing
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot calls getProductDetailsForCancel first.
If productStatus is 'ActiveGrace', bot routes silently to [Customer missed a payment] with no message to customer.

name: Subscription in ActivePaused - inform and confirm intent
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot calls getProductDetailsForCancel first.
If productStatus is 'ActivePaused', bot informs customer their subscription is paused.
Bot asks if they still want to cancel.

name: Subscription Frozen or Expired - inform ended
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot calls getProductDetailsForCancel first.
If productStatus is 'Frozen' or 'Expired', bot tells customer the subscription has ended and there will be no further charges.

name: Subscription already cancelled - inform and offer re-enable
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot calls getProductDetailsForCancel first.
If zuoraStatus is 'Cancelled', bot tells customer auto-renewal is already off.
Bot offers to re-enable the subscription.

name: Ask for cancellation reason - open-ended, not generic
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I just want to cancel.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for a cancellation reason before proceeding to any offer or impact step.
If customer replies with 'I just want to cancel' or equivalent, bot re-asks with an open-ended question.
Bot does NOT list example reasons.

name: Streaming/buffering issue - route to TS
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
The video keeps buffering and the quality is poor.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
If customer mentions streaming, buffering, quality, app, or device problem, bot routes to [TS Buffering and Poor Video Quality].

name: Refund request as reason - answer policy, do not cancel
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I want a refund.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
If customer gives refund request as reason, bot answers with refund policy.
Bot does NOT proceed with cancellation.

name: Retention offer available - present and handle acceptance
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
Because I don't use it much.
Yes, I'd like to accept the offer.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
Bot calls getCancelandOfferDetails after getProductDetailsForCancel.
If cancelOfferAvailable is true, bot shows cancelOfferMessage verbatim.
Bot asks 'Would you like me to set that up for you?'
If customer accepts, bot provides DAZN subscription management link.
Bot does NOT proceed with cancellation.

name: Retention offer not available - skip offer
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't watch sports anymore.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
Bot calls getCancelandOfferDetails after getProductDetailsForCancel.
If cancelOfferAvailable is false, bot does NOT present any retention offer.

name: FREE_TRIAL_PLAN - skip retention offer, show message
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't need it anymore.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
If cancellationOptionType is 'FREE_TRIAL_PLAN', bot skips retention offer entirely.
Bot shows cancellationOptionMessage verbatim.

name: Pause offer allowed - present and handle pause
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I'm having financial difficulties.
Can I pause instead?
I want to pause for 2 months.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
If financial hardship is mentioned, bot presents pause and retention offers before proceeding to cancellation.
If pauseDetails.pause is 'Allowed' for DAZN productGroup, bot offers pause before cancellation impact.
If customer wants to pause, bot asks for desired duration.
Bot validates duration against pausemaxdate.
Bot confirms pause details including nextchargedate.

name: Pause offer not allowed for non-DAZN products
conversation_script: I want to cancel my RallyTV subscription.
Can I pause it?
pass_criteria: Bot does NOT offer pause for RallyTV, FIBA, NationalLeagueTV, or NHL subscriptions.

name: Cancellation impact - IMMEDIATE_NO_FEE (within 14 days)
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't need it anymore.
Yes, please cancel now.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
If cancellationOptionType is 'IMMEDIATE_NO_FEE', bot shows immediate cancellation message: 'access will end today'.
Bot does NOT mention 30-day notice, nextChargeDate, or prorated charge.
Bot asks 'Would you like me to go ahead and cancel now?' and waits for explicit confirmation.
On confirmation, bot calls cancelProductImmediate.
On success, bot confirms: 'Your plan is cancelled. You won't be charged again, and your access ends today.'
Bot does NOT mention subscriptionEndDate or nextChargeDate.

name: Cancellation impact - 30-day notice with prorated charge
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't need it anymore.
Yes, cancel it.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
If cancellationOptionType is not 'IMMEDIATE_NO_FEE' or 'FREE_TRIAL_PLAN', bot shows 30-day notice message with nextChargeDate.
Bot mentions prorated final payment but does NOT state a specific monetary amount.
Bot asks 'Would you like me to go ahead and cancel now?' and waits for explicit confirmation.
On confirmation, bot calls cancelProduct.
On success, bot confirms cancellation with cancellableOnDate and mentions prorated charge on nextChargeDate.

name: Cancellation declined - do not cancel
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't need it anymore.
No, I changed my mind.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
Bot asks for explicit confirmation before cancelling.
If customer declines, bot does NOT cancel and closes gracefully.

name: Refund processed after cancellation - inform customer
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't need it anymore.
Yes, cancel it.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
Bot asks for explicit confirmation.
On cancellation, if refundProcessed is true in tool response, bot says: 'Your refund is successfully processed.'

name: Cancellation tool error - escalation
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
I don't need it anymore.
Yes, cancel it.
pass_criteria: Bot asks for cancellation reason.
Bot asks for explicit confirmation.
If cancelProduct or cancelProductImmediate tool returns an error, bot says: 'I want to make sure this is handled perfectly for you, so I'm bringing in one of our specialists to take care of this.'
Bot routes to [Chat With An Agent].

name: Communication rules - one question per message
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot never combines two questions in one response at any stage.

name: No filler or internal details revealed
conversation_script: I want to cancel my DAZN subscription.
pass_criteria: Bot does NOT use filler phrases like 'please wait', 'one moment', etc., during tool calls.
Bot does NOT reveal step numbers, variable names, tool/workflow names, internal flags, or eligibility criteria in any message.
